title: Software Engineer
description:
Please note this posting is to advertise potential job opportunities. This exact role may not be open today but could open in the near future. When you apply, a Cisco representative may contact you directly if a relevant position opens.
   

  

 Meet the Team
   

  

 The Enterprise Switching organization delivers top\\-tier products, with the Catalyst Cat9000 series leading in core, aggregation, and access switching for security, IoT, and Cloud. These switches are essential for SD\\-Access, Cisco's intent\\-based networking architecture, offering the bandwidth, speed, and scale needed for hybrid work environments. They improve security with PoE power and AI/ML for zero\\-trust security and provide outstanding network experiences both on\\-premises and in the cloud through Cisco DNA Center or the Meraki Dashboard. The new Catalyst 9000X models offer flexible operations and secure, high\\-speed performance. Our team is world\\-class for creating industry\\-leading products that have redefined the enterprise market for decades through innovation.
   

  

 Your impact
   

  

 Looking forward to getting an exciting start to your career? You will bring your outstanding talents to the group that works on Cisco's Switching technology, which large enterprises now consider to be the Networking Equipment of choice for critically important networks. In your role as a Software Engineer, you will develop and integrate products that are deployed by some of the leading Enterprises in the world. You will work with a BU\\-wide vibrant technical community, learning from experts and translating this learning into exciting opportunities for personal growth. You will work on networking equipment that forms a crucial backbone of many offices, hospitals, educational and financial institutions. You will learn about ground breaking technologies and platforms while developing software for these equipments. Experience the exhilaration of taking a product through development and integration.
   

  

**Minimum Qualifications**
* 1 \\- 3 years proven experience in internetworking technologies and applications.
* Good experience in developing software in C, under multi\\-threaded environment with Excellent problem\\-solving skills
* SDK Development: Design, implement, and maintain SDKs that enable seamless integration between software applications and underlying hardware or network layers
* Familiarity with DPDK (Data Plane Development Kit), P4 programming language, or similar frameworks for high\\-performance packet processing.
* 
* Experience with hardware platforms such as ASICs, FPGAs, or NPUs
* Hands on Data Structures, Operating Systems and Data Networking fundamentals
* Experience in development of Layer 2 (Ethernet) and/or Layer 3 Networking protocols including Routing, IPV4/6 (unicast/multicast) Is preferable
* Expertise in working with Linux OS
* Experience in any Cisco OS \\- XR, XE or NXOS would be a plus


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Bachelor's degree in computer science or related field (MS preferred).
* Good hands on implementation experience with one or more of the following: RTOS Internals, High Availability, IPC, Memory management, Distributed communications Infrastructure, Serviceability, Linux, Containers, Virtualization


 Why Cisco?
   

  

 At Cisco, we’re revolutionizing how data and infrastructure connect and protect organizations in the AI era – and beyond. We’ve been innovating fearlessly for 40 years to create solutions that power how humans and technology work together across the physical and digital worlds. These solutions provide customers with unparalleled security, visibility, and insights across the entire digital footprint.
   

  

 Fueled by the depth and breadth of our technology, we experiment and create meaningful solutions. Add to that our worldwide network of doers and experts, and you’ll see that the opportunities to grow and build are limitless. We work as a team, collaborating with empathy to make really big things happen on a global scale. Because our solutions are everywhere, our impact is everywhere.
   

  

 We are Cisco, and our power starts with you.

title: Software Engineer -Backend
description:
* Are you curious, excited by experimentation and always looking to innovate?
* Do you want to work in embedded payments where you can keep learning and developing whilst getting hands\\-on experience?
* Do you want to have the opportunity to play an important role in a rapidly growing and exciting Fintech business?


 If so, we would love to connect and collaborate!
   

  

 We want to hire ambitious, and value\\-adding talent into Modulr, one of the fastest growing payments businesses in the UK and Europe. Modulr is experiencing significant growth, and in this role you will work in a cross\\-functional team who are asked to solve a problem, rather than be handed a task to do. This is an excellent opportunity to work in a high\\-growth environment with a fast\\-paced and collaborative culture where you will have great opportunities to work on challenging problems.
   

  

**About Us**
 At Modulr, our vision is a world where all businesses are powered by embedded payments. Modulr enables businesses, from SMEs to Enterprise, initially across the UK and Europe to efficiently pay\\-in, collect and disburse funds instantly via a range of payment schemes, accounts, and card products.
   

  

 We have created an industry\\-leading API platform with comprehensive online tools and access, to meet the demands of daily business payments. We have two routes to market. Our Core Business Payments product allows customers in any sector to connect to us and our expanding network of accounting and payroll platforms, including Sage, Xero, BrightPay and IRIS to automate payments. Our Vertical Solutions targets a growing range of industry verticals which directly connect their IT platforms to our APIs and webhooks. We solve complex payment problems for hundreds of clients in a range of industries, including Travel, Lending, Wage Advance, and Investment \\& Wealth.
   

  

 We are deeply integrated into the payment eco\\-system. In the UK, we are direct participants of Faster Payments and Bacs. Modulr hold settlement accounts at the Bank of England. Our payment network connectivity includes CHAPS, Open Banking, SEPA, SWIFT and account issuance in multiple currencies. We are principal issuing members of Visa and Mastercard schemes across UK and Europe.
   

  

 Our regulatory permissions and governance structure are the foundations of our business. We are regulated and supervised as an Authorised Electronic Money Institution (AEMI) in the UK by the Financial Conduct Authority and in the Netherlands by De Nederlandsche Bank.
   

  

 Our founding team has a wealth of experience in the payments industry and growing successful businesses. Modulr is backed by the venture arms of payments giants PayPal and FIS, as well as growth investors Blenheim Chalcot, General Atlantic, Frog Capital and Highland Europe.
   

  

 Modulr now has over 400 employees spread globally across offices in London, Edinburgh, Amsterdam, Mumbai and Pune.
   

  

**Modulr values**
* Building the extraordinary; going that extra mile.
* Owning the opportunity; be passionate and proud of the time you invest.
* Move at pace; reach goals faster whilst supported on your career journey.
* Achieve it together, working collaboratively and being a Modulite.


**The Team**
 At Modulr we are focused on building autonomous squads that are focused on working in
   

  

 the best possible way. We operate in a tribes and squad model with each area focused on
   

  

 a particular growth area. Each squad is small and cross\\-functional. We have big ambitions and have many interesting challenges ahead.
   

  

**Summary**
 In this role you will design, build, and evolve the next generation of Modulr’s event\\-driven payments platform. You’ll work across the full engineering lifecycle—from shaping technical approaches to delivering production\\-grade software—within a squad that values ownership, excellence, and continuous improvement.
   

  

 Specific duties
   

  

**Engineering \\& Architecture**
* Design and develop backend services using Java (17\\+) or similar OO languages.
* Build and evolve microservices and distributed, event\\-driven components in a cloud\\-native environment.
* Contribute to architectural patterns that support throughput, resilience, reliability, and observability.
* Design clean, well\\-documented RESTful APIs and service contracts.
* Work with relational data stores, especially PostgreSQL, and contribute to data modelling.


 Distributed Systems \\& Reliability
   

  

* Engineer solutions for concurrency, idempotency, fault tolerance, retries, and high availability.
* Improve system performance, reduce latency, and identify bottlenecks across services.
* Build systems with strong observability—logs, metrics, tracing—ensuring issues can be diagnosed quickly.


**Quality \\& Testing**
* Develop comprehensive automated tests using frameworks such as JUnit, Mockito, Cucumber.
* Participate in design and code reviews, helping raise engineering standards across the team.
* Advocate for code quality, maintainability, and long\\-term technical health.


 DevOps, Cloud \\& Tooling
   

  

* Use and improve deployment pipelines and operational tooling (Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, AWS services).
* Contribute to internal frameworks, shared libraries, and engineering best practices.
* Help shape the evolution of our platform toward a more flexible, modern architecture.


 Collaboration \\& Delivery
   

  

* Work in an agile environment, contributing to planning, design discussions, and iterative delivery.
* Collaborate across squads to shape technical solutions that span multiple systems.
* Document best practices, reference architectures, and design approaches others can rely on.


**About You**
 You’re an engineer who thrives in a fast\\-paced, high\\-growth environment and enjoys solving complex, system\\-level problems. You bring:
   

  

* Expertise in Java or another OO language with willingness to work in Java.
* Strong understanding of OOP, design patterns, and distributed systems fundamentals.
* Experience building and operating microservices in production.
* Ability to reason about concurrency, performance, and system behaviour under load.
* Clear, proactive communication and a collaborative, team\\-first mindset.
* Strong analytical and problem\\-solving skills supported by sound engineering judgement.
* Ability to manage complexity, balance competing priorities, and deliver high\\-quality work.
* A growth mindset—you enjoy learning, improving, and helping others grow.
* A self\\-starter attitude with a passion for ownership and continuous improvement.


**ModInclusion**
 At Modulr, we are working hard to build a more positive diverse and inclusive culture that helps everyone to feel they belong and can truly bring their whole self to work. Not only is it the right thing to do for everyone in the Modulr team, it’s also the right thing to do for our business, the community we operate in and attracting future talent. As part of our approach, we actively welcome applications from candidates with diverse backgrounds.

title: Manual Tester
description:
Manual Tester
   

  

**Location:** 
 BLR ATC, Bengaluru
   

  

**Years of Experience:** 
 7\\-10 Years
   

  

**Job Summary:** 
 We are seeking a skilled Manual Tester responsible for ensuring application quality, reliability, and performance through structured test planning, execution, and defect management. The ideal candidate will analyze business requirements and design documents to create effective test scenarios, prepare and execute test cases, and perform various testing types including functional, regression, integration, system, UAT, and smoke/sanity testing.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Analyze business requirements and design documents to create comprehensive test scenarios.

**Preferred Skills**

* Exposure to automation concepts (Selenium, Python, Java).
* Telecom domain experience.
* Familiarity with performance or security testing basics.


**Qualifications:** 
 Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.

title: Software Engineer II-TS
description:
**Our Purpose**
*Mastercard powers economies and empowers people in 200\\+ countries and territories worldwide. Together with our customers, we’re helping build a sustainable economy where everyone can prosper. We support a wide range of digital payments choices, making transactions secure, simple, smart and accessible. Our technology and innovation, partnerships and networks combine to deliver a unique set of products and services that help people, businesses and governments realize their greatest potential.*
**Title And Summary**
 Software Engineer II\\-TS
   

  

 Who is Mastercard?
   

  

 Mastercard is a global technology company in the payments industry. We work to connect and power an inclusive, digital economy that benefits everyone, everywhere by making transactions safe, simple, smart and accessible.
   

  

 Our mission is to connect and power an inclusive, digital economy that benefits everyone, everywhere by making transactions safe, simple, smart, and accessible. Using secure data and networks, partnerships and passion, our innovations and solutions help individuals, financial institutions, governments, and businesses realize their greatest potential.
   

  

 Our decency quotient, or DQ, drives our culture and everything we do inside and outside of our company. With connections across more than 210 countries and territories, we are building a sustainable world that unlocks priceless possibilities for all.
   

  

**Overview**
 Transfer Solutions is responsible for driving Mastercard’s expansion in payments from two key strategic flows: Disbursements \\& Remittances and Bill Payments. The Product \\& Engineering teams within Transfer Solutions are responsible for designing, developing, launching, and maintaining products and services designed to capture these flows from a wide range of Customer segments.
   

  

 Do you like to be part of a team that creates and executes strategic initiatives centered around digital payments?
   

  

 Do you look forward to developing and engaging with high performant diverse teams around the globe?
   

  

 Would you like to be part of a highly visible, strategically important global engineering organization?
   

  

**The Role**
 What’s it all about and what we expect you to do day to day?
   

  

 Own software delivery tasks (code development, test, deployment) at an application/software component level.
   

  

 Able to troubleshoot and refactor existing code for exceptional code quality.
   

  

 Adopt new languages and architecture patterns needed for the work.
   

  

 Participate and contribute to team’s agile process and decisions.
   

  

 Pull from backlog and deliver work after seeking guidance from experienced team members and in partnership with full scrum team.
   

  

 Understands the big picture and end\\-to\\-end logical architecture of systems in ownership areas.
   

  

 Provide feedback and suggestions on areas to improve.
   

  

 Understands the use of Mastercard technology policies in everyday work.
   

  

 Demonstrate active learning and sharing of software practices via Guild/Engineering community initiatives.
   

  

 Influence the decisions made by the team.
   

  

 Assist peers and less experienced members.
   

  

 Influence the decisions made by the team.
   

  

 Assist in technical documentation of APIs and services being delivered.
   

  

**All About You And What You Need To Bring**
 Has ability to write secure code in three or more languages (e.g., Java, JavaScript, SQL)
   

  

 Familiar with secure coding standards (e.g., OWASP, CWE, SEI CERT)
   

  

 Infrastructure as code and cloud first software development knowledge experience preferred.
   

  

 Understands and implements standard branching (e.g., Gitflow) and peer review practices
   

  

 Apply tools (e.g., Sonar, Zally, Checkmarx ) and techniques to scan and measure code quality and anti\\-patterns as part of development activity
   

  

 Understands and builds test code at unit level, service level, and integration level to ensure code and functional coverage.
   

  

 Understands the use of basic design patterns (e.g., factory, adaptor, singleton, composite, observer, strategy, inversion of control)
   

  

 Understands requirement analysis being essential part of delivering value to our customers and partners and participate in elaboration, prioritization, and effort estimation.
   

  

 Understands agile and modern SDLC practices (Scrum/Kanban/Continuous Delivery/DevOps/Quality engineering) and the delivery situations they are used for.
   

  

 Understands the basic engineering principles used in building and running mission critical software capabilities (security, customer experience, testing, operability, simplification, service\\-oriented architecture)
   

  

 Familiar with different application patterns to implement different types of business processes (e.g., APIs, event\\-driven\\-services, batch\\-services, web\\-applications, big data)
   

  

 Understands Continuous Integration (CI) and Delivery (CD) concepts, and capabilities to support automation, pipelines, virtualization, and containerization.
   

  

 Has ability to write code (in languages such as Java, Python, Ruby, Bash, Perl, Groovy) to build automation tasks that are repeatable and efficient.
   

  

 Understands functional and non\\-functional testing types to elaborate and estimate test efforts.
   

  

**Corporate Security Responsibility**
 All activities involving access to Mastercard assets, information, and networks comes with an inherent risk to the organization and, therefore, it is expected that every person working for, or on behalf of, Mastercard is responsible for information security and must:
   

  

* Abide by Mastercard’s security policies and practices;
* Ensure the confidentiality and integrity of the information being accessed;
* Report any suspected information security violation or breach, and
* Complete all periodic mandatory security trainings in accordance with Mastercard’s guidelines.

title: Staff Software Engineer - Back End (Gurugram based)
description:
**About Agoda**
 At Agoda, we bridge the world through travel. Our story began in 2005, when two lifelong friends and entrepreneurs, driven by their passion for travel, launched Agoda to make it easier for everyone to explore the world.
   

  

 Today, we are part of Booking Holdings \\[NASDAQ: BKNG], with a diverse team of over 7,000 people from 90 countries, working together in offices around the globe. Every day, we connect people to destinations and experiences, with our great deals across our millions of hotels and holiday properties, flights, and experiences worldwide.
   

  

 No two days are the same at Agoda. Data and technology are at the heart of our culture, fueling our curiosity and innovation. If you’re ready to begin your best journey and help build travel for the world, join us.
   

  

**Get to Know our Team:**
 In Agoda’s Back End Engineering department, we build the scalable, fault\\-tolerant systems and APIs that host our core business logic. Our systems cover all major areas of our business: inventory and pricing, product information, customer data, communications, partner data, booking systems, payments, and more. These mission\\-critical systems change frequently with dozens of releases per day, so we must employ state\\-of\\-the\\-art CI/CD and testing techniques in order to make sure everything works without any downtime. We also ensure that our systems are self\\-healing, responding gracefully to extreme loads or unexpected input. In order to accomplish this, we use state\\-of\\-the\\-art languages like Scala and Go, data technologies like Kafka and Aerospike, and agile development practices. Most importantly though, we hire great people from all around the world and empower them to be successful. Whether it’s building new projects like Flights and Packages or reimagining our existing business, you’ll make a big impact as part of the Back End Engineering team.
   

  

**The Opportunity:**
 Agoda is looking for developers to work on mission critical systems that deal with the designing and development of APIs that serve millions of user search requests a day.
   

  

**In this Role, you'll get to**
* Lead development of features, experiments, technical projects and complex systems
* Be a technical architect, mentor, and driver towards the right technology
* Continue to evolve our architecture and build better software
* Be a major contributor to our agile and scrum practices
* Get involved with software engineering and collaborate with server, other client, and infrastructure technical team members to build the best solution
* Constantly look for ways to improve our products, code\\-base and development practices
* Write great code and help others write great code
* Drive Technical decisions in the organization.


**What You’ll Need To Succeed**
* 7\\+ years’ experience under your belt developing performance\\-critical applications that run in a production environment using Scala, Java or C\\#.
* Experience in leading projects, initiatives and/or teams, with full ownership of the systems involved
* Data platforms like SQL, Cassandra or Hadoop. You understand that different applications have different data requirements
* Good understanding of algorithms and data structures
* Strong coding ability
* You are passionate about the craft of software development and constantly work to improve your knowledge and skills
* Excellent verbal and written English communication skills


**It’s Great If You Have**
* Experience with Scrum/Agile development methodologies
* Experience building large\\-scale distributed products

**Responsibilities**

+ Atomics and memory ordering

* Understand trade\\-offs between:

* Design or review thread pools and task scheduling systems.
* Debugging, Diagnostics \\& Reliability

* Perform core dump analysis and post\\-mortem debugging.

* Collaboration \\& Technical Leadership

**Qualifications**
* Primary: C\\+\\+ (C\\+\\+17 or later)

title: Python Backend Engineer
description:

**About The Role**
 The company is seeking a highly skilled Senior Staff Engineer specializing in Python Backend development and Large Language Models (LLMs) to join their innovative AI team. In this role, you will be instrumental in designing, developing, and deploying AI\\-powered applications that leverage state\\-of\\-the\\-art LLMs and modern backend architectures. Your expertise will contribute to building intelligent agents, retrieval\\-augmented generation (RAG) pipelines, and scalable APIs that support next\\-generation AI products. This position offers an exciting opportunity to work on complex AI systems, optimize performance, and influence the future of AI\\-driven solutions on a global scale.
   

  

**Qualifications**

Proven experience in Python programming and a solid understanding of AI frameworks and APIs are essential. Candidates must demonstrate hands\\-on experience with large language models, open\\-source models, and related AI tools such as LangChain, Haystack, and LlamaIndex. Familiarity with RAG, embeddings, and vector search technologies is required. Additionally, experience in building production backend systems, understanding distributed systems, and deploying solutions on cloud platforms like AWS, GCP, or Azure is highly desirable. Strong problem\\-solving skills, excellent communication abilities, and a proactive approach to learning and innovation are key attributes for this role.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 The responsibilities for this senior role encompass a broad spectrum of technical and strategic tasks:
   

  

* Design, implement, and optimize applications utilizing various LLMs such as GPT\\-4/5, Claude, Gemini, LLaMA, and others, ensuring high performance and scalability.
* Develop advanced prompt engineering techniques, including system prompting and structured output pipelines, to enhance AI model responses.
* Build and maintain retrieval\\-augmented generation (RAG) systems with hybrid search capabilities, integrating semantic, keyword, and hybrid search methodologies.
* Implement multi\\-agent systems and autonomous workflows to facilitate complex AI operations.
* Fine\\-tune foundation models using techniques like LoRA, QLoRA, PEFT, and adapters to adapt models for specific use cases.
* Deploy open\\-source LLMs using tools such as vLLM, TGI, Ollama, and Triton, ensuring reliable and efficient inference.
* Integrate multimodal models that process text, images, audio, and video data to create comprehensive AI solutions.
* Develop evaluation pipelines to detect hallucinations, factual inaccuracies, and biases in AI outputs, ensuring model reliability and fairness.
* Implement guardrails, moderation, and alignment techniques to maintain AI safety and compliance standards.
* Optimize latency, throughput, and cost metrics for LLM inference, ensuring efficient resource utilization.
* Build scalable backend systems with frameworks like FastAPI, Django, or Flask, including designing REST, GraphQL, and streaming APIs.
* Develop microservices and event\\-driven architectures, integrating relational, NoSQL, and in\\-memory databases for robust data management.
* Implement security best practices, including authentication and authorization, to safeguard AI systems and data.
* Design and manage AI infrastructure, including model serving, inference pipelines, monitoring, logging, and CI/CD workflows for ML/LLM operations.
* Handle versioning of models, prompts, and datasets, and automate retraining and evaluation pipelines, ensuring continuous improvement of AI models.
* Build and maintain document ingestion, chunking, and preprocessing pipelines for knowledge systems.
* Work with vector databases like Pinecone, Weaviate, Milvus, and FAISS to enable efficient semantic search and knowledge graph development.
* Manage cloud deployment strategies, including Kubernetes\\-based inference clusters, autoscaling, GPU/TPU utilization, and cost optimization on cloud platforms like AWS, GCP, or Azure.


**Benefits**

Employees enjoy health insurance coverage, performance\\-based incentives, and opportunities for continuous learning through training programs and certifications. The organization fosters a collaborative and innovative work environment, encouraging creativity and initiative. Additionally, flexible work arrangements and a focus on work\\-life balance contribute to a fulfilling career experience. The company also promotes diversity and inclusion, ensuring that all employees are valued and empowered to contribute their best.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 The company is an equal opportunity employer committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. They do not discriminate based on race, color, religion, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, age, disability, or any other protected characteristic. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to these factors, and the organization values diversity and equal opportunity in all aspects of employment.

**About the Role:** 




 We are looking for experienced software engineers (tech lead level) who are familiar with high\\-quality public GitHub repositories and can contribute to this project. **Why Join Us?** 




 Turing is one of the world’s fastest\\-growing AI companies accelerating the advancement and deployment of powerful AI systems.  At least 4 hours per day and minimum 20 hours per week with overlap of 4 hours with PST. (We have 3 options of time commitment: 20 hrs/week, 30 hrs/week or 40 hrs/week)

title: Principal Engineer
description:
* Are you curious, excited by experimentation, and always looking for a better way of doing things?
* Do you want to keep learning and developing whilst getting hands\\-on experience working in the payments space?
* Do you want to have the opportunity to apply technology to transform the way we operate at scale.


 If so, we would love to hear from you!
   

  

 We are looking to hire ambitious, and value\\-adding talent to join Modulr, the fastest growing payments business in the UK and Europe. The Principal Engineer is a hands\\-on individual contributor role with broad technical influence across multiple teams within our Engineering, CTO team. In this role you will work in a cross\\-functional team who are asked to solve a problem, rather than be handed a task to do. This is an excellent opportunity to work in a high\\-growth environment with a fast\\-paced and collaborative culture where you will have great opportunities to work on challenging problems.
   

  

**About Us**
 At Modulr our mission is to move money efficiently to power business productivity. We are building a new digital payments service to make money flow more efficiently through businesses and the economy. This is a new type of payments account that is built for businesses that need faster, easier and more reliable ways to move money.
   

  

 Our flexible platform and innovative approach allows our customers to utilise our payments account instead of a traditional bank account. Our accounts come with a sort code and account number, access to payment systems (eg Faster Payments and Visa) and everything our customers need from a payments account. They can instantly open as many accounts as they need, automate how they make and receive payments as well as the reconciliation processes these create. All in real time, 24/7 through their own systems utilising our API that integrates into any platform.
   

  

 Our founding team has a wealth of experience in the payments industry and growing successful businesses. Modulr is backed by payments giants PayPal Ventures and FIS Ventures, as well as startup and scale up specialists Blenheim Chalcot, General Atlantic, Frog and Highland Europe which enables us to leverage their resources and expertise to drive our growth initiatives. These partnerships provide us with the necessary provisions to propel our business to new heights.
   

  

**Modulr values**
* Building the extraordinary and going that extra mile
* Owning the opportunity, be passionate and proud of the time you invest
* Move at pace, reach your goals faster with us supporting you each step of the way
* Achieve it together, working as a team and being a Modulite


**The Tech Team**
 At Modulr we are focused on building autonomous squads that are focused on working in the best possible way. We operate in a tribes and squad model with each area focused on a particular growth area. Each squad is small and cross\\-functional. We have big ambitions and have many interesting challenges ahead. Our strategy is to provide our customers with seamless connectivity into payment schemes both domestically and overseas no matter where they're based.
   

  

**About The Role**
* Lead in Design, analysis and documentation of products, systems or subsystems, setting the technical direction for key parts of the platform.
* Provide hands\\-on technical leadership on the most complex areas of the platform, pairing with teams and unblocking hard engineering problems and raising the quality bar.
* Take principal ownership of core framework components such as the workflow engine, rules/decision engine and event\\-driven orchestration layer, defining patterns and abstractions that other teams reuse.
* Design and evolve event\\-driven architectures that support real\\-time decisioning, auditability and replay across multiple domains.
* Lead the design and implementation of agentic AI–driven workflows, orchestrating services and AI components to assist human operators while keeping decisions explainable and controlled.
* Define and own domain models, service boundaries and integration contracts, using techniques like domain\\-driven design and hexagonal architecture to keep systems loosely coupled and vendor\\-agnostic.
* Drive engineering standards, tooling, and processes to the next level – from code quality and testing through to observability, reliability and security.
* Develop and execute test procedures for software.
* Proactively identify issues, bottlenecks, gaps, or other areas of concerns or opportunities and work to either directly affect change, or advocate for that change.
* Work in an agile environment \\- Scrum or Kanban.
* Document best practices, guides, systems design, reference architectures and implementations.
* Participate in design and code reviews.
* Contribute to the evolution of our architecture to make it more flexible and easier to use.
* Be an ambassador for technical excellence both within Modulr and externally by representing Modulr in events and conferences.


**About You**
* Able to clearly communicate architectural goals and standards.
* Ability to deep dive into technical problems and customer led challenges
* Strong analytical thinking, problem\\-solving, appropriate judgement and decision\\-making skill
* Commitment to collaboration and teamwork
* Proven ability to effectively manage timelines and deliverables
* You thrives in complex, rapidly changing environments and can make sound judgements amid ambiguity
* You are a self\\-starter, motivated team player who thrives in a fast\\-paced environment
* You enjoy shaping architecture as well as code – guiding service boundaries, contracts, writing complex frameworks and event models that other teams build on.
* You have a strong track record of building high\\-scale, reliable systems, and you are comfortable designing for resilience, observability and graceful degradation from day one.
* You are comfortable in building event\\-driven and data\\-driven platforms.
* You are curious/passionate about AI and automation and think carefully about where agents/LLMs add real value while staying within risk and control boundaries.


 Technical knowledge required
   

  

* Expert in Java with deep experience building and operating distributed microservices in a cloud environment, at scale
* Expert in OOPs and design patterns.
* Expert in REST API design.
* Strong practical knowledge of event\\-driven architectures.
* Open\\-Source technologies, such as Spring and Hibernate.
* Strong background in observability and reliability
* Open\\-source RDBMS technologies such as PostgreSQL
* Experience testing across different levels of applications and advocate for best practice.


**Nice to have**
* Experience with compliance / risk / FinCrime domains
* Hands\\-on experience designing or integrating workflow engines.
* Experience with rules / decision engines and a clear view on how to manage rule lifecycle, versioning and testing at scale.
* Experience/understanding of agentic / AI\\-driven systems and how to integrate them into backend workflows with appropriate guardrails, monitoring and fallbacks.
* Exposure to payment schemes/flows, regulatory frameworks, SME/partner onboarding; experience reducing false positives via rule tuning/enrichment; familiarity with schema governance and data‑lineage tooling is a strong plus.


**ModInclusion**
 We believe that by seeing Modulr, and the world, from all sorts of angles, we can make life better for all. We want you to know that the things that make you, you — like your identity, age, ability, and background — are things that we will always celebrate and support with open arms. As such, we are keen to maximise the diversity of our workforce and actively encourage applications from anyone and everyone.

title: Data Scientist
description:
**About The Company**
 Deloitte is a globally renowned professional services organization committed to delivering innovative solutions and strategic insights across various industries. With a rich history of excellence, Deloitte offers a broad spectrum of services including consulting, audit, tax, risk advisory, and financial advisory. The company prides itself on fostering a culture of integrity, collaboration, and continuous learning, empowering its employees to make a meaningful impact on clients and communities worldwide. Deloitte’s commitment to diversity and inclusion, coupled with its focus on technological innovation, positions it as a leader in shaping the future of business and society.
   

  

**About The Role**
 The Digital Excellence Centre (DEC) at Deloitte India is a hub for building cutting\\-edge digital products and platforms aimed at elevating customer experiences through innovative design thinking and advanced technology. As a Machine Learning Engineer within the DEC, you will be instrumental in designing, developing, and deploying sophisticated AI solutions that address complex business challenges. Your role involves collaborating with cross\\-functional teams, including data scientists, UX designers, and product managers, to create intelligent applications capable of learning and adapting over time. This position offers an exciting opportunity to work on impactful projects that leverage the latest advancements in artificial intelligence, deep learning, and data science, contributing to Deloitte’s reputation as a pioneer in digital transformation.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The ideal candidate should possess a strong educational background, preferably with a graduation degree in engineering, computer science, data science, or related fields. Prior experience in applying statistical modeling, machine learning, natural language processing (NLP), and deep learning techniques is essential. Candidates should demonstrate proficiency in processing large datasets, performing exploratory data analysis, and developing robust models. Strong programming skills in languages such as Python, R, or Java are required, along with experience in deploying AI solutions in production environments. Familiarity with generative AI and ethical technology practices will be considered advantageous. Effective communication skills, creative problem\\-solving abilities, and the capacity to work independently in a fast\\-paced environment are also important qualifications for this role.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Partner with stakeholders to identify high\\-impact applications of data analytics and machine learning to solve strategic business problems.
* Mine, analyze, and interpret medium to large datasets to extract actionable insights that drive business value for clients.
* Design, develop, and refine advanced statistical and machine learning models, ensuring their scalability and efficiency.
* Implement processes to evaluate, automate, and optimize model performance, including A/B testing and continuous monitoring.
* Collaborate with cross\\-functional teams to test, deploy, and iterate on data science solutions, ensuring seamless integration into existing systems.
* Build and execute rigorous experiments and A/B tests to validate model effectiveness and user engagement.
* Provide feedback and insights to improve data collection processes, ensuring data accuracy, legitimacy, and relevance.
* Stay updated with emerging AI trends and incorporate innovative techniques to enhance model capabilities.
* Document technical approaches and communicate findings effectively to both technical and non\\-technical stakeholders.


**Benefits**
 Deloitte offers a comprehensive benefits package designed to support the well\\-being and professional growth of its employees. This includes competitive compensation, health insurance, retirement plans, and wellness programs. Employees have access to continuous learning opportunities through training sessions, certifications, and leadership development programs. The organization promotes a flexible work environment, encouraging work\\-life balance with hybrid working arrangements tailored to individual needs. Deloitte also fosters a collaborative and inclusive culture, providing platforms for networking, mentorship, and community engagement. Additionally, employees can participate in various CSR initiatives, contributing positively to society and the environment.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Deloitte is committed to creating an inclusive environment where all employees are valued and respected for their unique perspectives and contributions. The organization provides equal employment opportunities regardless of race, gender, age, religion, disability, or background. Diversity and inclusion are integral to Deloitte’s culture, fostering innovation and driving better business outcomes. The company encourages applications from all qualified individuals and strives to ensure a welcoming and supportive workplace for everyone.

title: QA Engineer
description:
**About The Company**
 FinacPlus is a Great Place to Work® Certified organization — a recognition of our people\\-first culture, collaborative environment, and focus on professional growth. We provide high\\-end virtual business process and technology services to leading global clients across finance, banking, mortgage, research, and data services. At FinacPlus, you’ll work with world\\-class talent, cutting\\-edge technology, and international stakeholders — while still enjoying the openness, agility, and career visibility of a fast\\-growing company.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking a highly skilled Senior QA Engineer (Manual) to join our team. This role is not just about executing test cases but about owning the quality of the product end\\-to\\-end. As a quality owner, you will be responsible for defining and implementing comprehensive test strategies, ensuring the delivery of high\\-quality, scalable, and reliable enterprise applications, particularly in financial or data\\-intensive environments. Your expertise will be critical in validating UI, APIs, and data layers, and in proactively identifying risks that could impact production stability and performance.
   

  

 You will collaborate closely with engineering, product, and data teams to ensure that every release meets the highest standards of quality. This position offers an opportunity to influence product quality at a strategic level and contribute to the development of mission\\-critical mortgage technology platforms supporting real estate financing across the U.S. and U.K.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The ideal candidate will have 5\\-8 years of hands\\-on QA experience, particularly in product or SaaS environments. Mandatory experience includes testing complex, production\\-grade web applications, with a strong emphasis on data\\-heavy or financial systems. Proven ability to own test strategies, lead release quality initiatives, and handle complex workflows and edge cases is essential. Candidates should possess deep understanding of SDLC \\& STLC, defect lifecycle management, and risk\\-based testing techniques. Experience in testing APIs, databases, UI, and cross\\-platform applications is required. Familiarity with automation frameworks and tools such as Selenium, Playwright, or similar is a plus, although this role primarily focuses on manual testing expertise.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Own and drive the end\\-to\\-end quality strategy across features, releases, and production validation cycles to ensure product excellence.
* Design risk\\-based test strategies covering functional, integration, regression, and non\\-functional testing aspects.
* Conduct deep validation of UI/UX flows, ensuring cross\\-browser compatibility and responsiveness.
* Validate APIs through request/response testing, error handling, and edge case analysis, ensuring robust integration points.
* Perform data validation, including data integrity checks, transformation validation, and reconciliation in databases.
* Create and maintain detailed test plans, scenarios, and traceability matrices aligned with requirements and edge cases.
* Lead defect triage sessions, perform root cause analysis, and ensure long\\-term fixes are implemented.
* Participate in requirement reviews and system design discussions to ensure testability and comprehensive coverage.
* Validate complex business workflows, especially in data\\-heavy or financial systems, to ensure correctness and reliability.
* Drive release readiness assessments and provide go/no\\-go recommendations based on quality metrics.
* Identify and communicate quality risks early, influencing engineering decisions to mitigate potential issues.
* Collaborate with automation teams to identify automation opportunities and ensure meaningful, high\\-coverage automation scripts.
* Mentor junior QA engineers, fostering high testing standards and quality thinking frameworks.
* Continuously improve QA processes, documentation, and testing efficiency to adapt to evolving project needs.


**Benefits**
 Joining FinacPlus offers numerous benefits, including working in a collaborative and inclusive culture recognized as Great Place to Work®. You will gain exposure to global financial technology platforms and work directly with stakeholders across India, the U.S., and U.K. The role provides an opportunity to work on data\\-intensive, enterprise\\-grade systems, contributing significantly to mission\\-critical applications. We offer a hybrid working model that promotes a healthy work\\-life balance, along with a high ownership role that allows you to make a tangible impact on product quality. Competitive compensation packages, professional development opportunities, and a dynamic work environment are also part of our employee value proposition.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 FinacPlus is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, gender, age, sexual orientation, disability, or any other protected characteristic. We believe that diverse teams foster innovation and excellence, and we are dedicated to providing equal employment opportunities to all qualified candidates.

title: Senior Software Development Engineer in Test - IOS/Android(Java, Appium)
description:
**Join Us – Be Part of the Everywhere Workplace!**
 Are you an expert in mobile automation, passionate about building robust quality engineering practices, and ready to drive excellence at global scale? At Ivanti, we empower people to work anywhere, anytime—safely and seamlessly. Join our diverse team, make a difference, and grow your impact in ways that matter!
   

  

**Why this role matters**
 In this high\\-impact role, you’ll be at the center of shaping our mobile test strategy and elevating our QA game. You won't just build test frameworks—you’ll lead quality initiatives across teams and help deliver secure, engaging experiences for our users everywhere. Your leadership and expertise will accelerate product innovation, support our “Everywhere Workplace” vision, and help scale quality testing globally.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Lead mobile test strategy and planning for complex feature areas (iOS/Android).
* Architect and maintain test automation frameworks with Appium, XCUITest, Espresso, and Java.
* Design and execute comprehensive test suites (functional, regression, integration, UI/UX, system\\-level).
* Integrate automation seamlessly into CI/CD pipelines and device testing clouds.
* Drive testing for MDM workflows, device compliance, certificates, and provisioning.
* Develop and run unit, API, smoke, and end\\-to\\-end tests across mobile stacks.
* Maintain and enhance test case repositories for maximum coverage.
* Standardize test data management, mocking, and mobile test environments.
* Review peers’ automation code, enforcing best practices.
* Mentor and coach SDETs, growing our engineering community.
* Coordinate defect triage with development, product, and release leads.
* Champion quality metrics, reducing test flakiness and redundancy.
* Partner with DevOps on cloud and device testing environments.
* Stay ahead of new testing frameworks, OS updates, and security requirements.


**Essential**
**What you will bring:**
* 6\\+ years' experience in software testing or SDET roles.
* Deep experience with Java\\-based mobile automation (Appium, XCUITest, Espresso).
* Hands\\-on testing of MDM\\-enabled mobile apps (e.g., Ivanti, Intune, Workspace ONE).
* Strong iOS automation skills (Xcode, XCTest, XCUI).
* Proven ability to build or extend test frameworks and reusable components.
* Experience with TestRail, Jira, Git, and CI tools (Jenkins, GitHub Actions, Bitrise).
* Solid understanding of unit testing, mocking, app architectures, REST APIs, networking, and security testing.
* Experience planning/executing tests for large releases and diverse device matrices.


**Nice\\-to\\-haves**
* Test automation for MDM/enterprise\\-distributed apps.
* Experience with certificate\\-based auth, VPNs, identity providers, or MTD.
* Familiarity with Swift/Objective\\-C, mobile accessibility standards/tools, performance and crash analysis tools.
* Champion for shift\\-left testing (TDD/BDD) and contributions to open\\-source automation libraries.


**Soft Skills**
* You’re passionate about quality at scale—an organized leader who thrives in fast\\-moving teams.
* You communicate clearly, collaborate across functions, and love coaching others.
* You’re a life\\-long learner and proactive problem solver.


**Why Ivanti?**
* Remote\\-friendly \\& flexible: Work wherever you thrive with our flexible schedules.
* Competitive rewards: Health, wellness, and financial benefits that fit your life.
* Global \\& diverse: Collaborate with talented teammates from 25 countries.
* Learning \\& growth: Access the best tools and programs to develop your skills.
* Equity \\& belonging: Every voice matters—help us build solutions for a changing world.


**What Drives Us**
 Ivanti’s mission is to elevate human potential by managing, protecting, and automating technology for continuous innovation. We believe in diverse, inclusive teams where everyone belongs, and we thrive together.
   

  

**Ready to be part of the Everywhere Workplace?**
 Apply now and help us build a future where work is what you do—not where you go.
   

  

 If you require adjustments during the recruitment process, reach out to talent@ivanti.com – we’re here to help.
   

  

 Ivanti is proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer. We celebrate diversity and welcome all applicants.

title: Remote Golang Engineer
description:
**About the projects:** 
 we are building LLM evaluation and training datasets to train LLM to work on realistic software engineering problems. One of our approaches, in this project, is to build verifiable SWE tasks based on public repository histories
 
 in a synthetic approach with human\\-in\\-the\\-loop;
 
 while expanding the dataset coverage to different types of tasks in terms of programming language, difficulty level, and etc.
 



  





**About the Role:** 




 We are looking for experienced software engineers (tech lead level) who are familiar with high\\-quality public GitHub repositories and can contribute to this project. This role involves hands\\-on software engineering work, including development environment automation, issue triaging, and evaluating test coverage and quality
 



  





**Why Join Us?** 




 Turing is one of the world’s fastest\\-growing AI companies accelerating the advancement and deployment of powerful AI systems. You’ll be at the forefront of evaluating how LLMs interact with real code, influencing the future of AI\\-assisted software development. This is a unique opportunity to blend practical software engineering with AI research.
 



  





**What does day\\-to\\-day look like:** 



* Analyze and triage GitHub issues across trending open\\-source libraries.
* Set up and configure code repositories, including Dockerization and environment setup.
* Evaluating unit test coverage and quality.
* Modify and run codebases locally to assess LLM performance in bug\\-fixing scenarios.
* Collaborate with researchers to design and identify repositories and issues that are challenging for LLMs.
* Opportunities to lead a team of junior engineers to collaborate on projects.



  





**Required Skills:** 



* Minimum 3\\+ years of overall experience
* Strong experience with at least one of the following languages: Go
* Proficiency with Git, Docker, and basic software pipeline setup.
* Ability to understand and navigate complex codebases.
* Comfortable running, modifying, and testing real\\-world projects locally.
* Experience contributing to or evaluating open\\-source projects is a plus.



  





**Nice to Have:** 



* Previous participation in LLM research or evaluation projects.
* Experience building or testing developer tools or automation agents.



  





**Perks of Freelancing With Turing:** 



* Work in a fully remote environment.
* Opportunity to work on cutting\\-edge AI projects with leading LLM companies.



  





**Offer Details:** 



* **Commitments Required:** 
 At least 4 hours per day and minimum 20 hours per week with overlap of 4 hours with PST. (We have 3 options of time commitment: 20 hrs/week, 30 hrs/week or 40 hrs/week)
* **Employment type:** 
 Contractor assignment (no medical/paid leave)



  





**After applying, you will receive an email with a login link. Please use that link to access the portal and complete your profile.** 




  





 Know amazing talent? Refer them at turing.com/referrals, and earn money from your network.

title: Golang Backend Intern
description:
**Backend Developer Internship (Golang) @ Truck Hai
 



  





 Location: Remote \\| Duration: 3 months \\| Type: Unpaid
 



  





 ⸻
 



  





 About Truck Hai
 



  





 At Truck Hai, we’re building India’s most trusted logistics network — one that powers the backbone of the $200B trucking industry. Our mission is to bring trust, transparency, and technology to every shipment through a unified platform for truck booking, tracking, and logistics management.
 



  





 ⸻
 



  





 Role Overview
 



  





 We’re looking for a Backend Developer Intern who will work on building and scaling the core backend systems that power the Truck Hai platform. You will work closely with the tech team to develop robust APIs, manage databases, and build reliable infrastructure using Golang and PostgreSQL.
 



  





 ⸻
 



  





 What You’ll Do
 



 • Develop and maintain backend services using Golang.
 



 • Design and build RESTful APIs to support mobile and web applications.
 



 • Work with PostgreSQL for database design, queries, and performance optimization.
 



 • Implement secure authentication, data validation, and error handling.
 



 • Optimize backend services for performance, scalability, and reliability.
 



 • Collaborate with frontend developers and product teams to integrate APIs smoothly.
 



 • Debug issues and maintain server\\-side logs and monitoring.
 



 • Participate in backend testing, deployment, and version releases.
 



  





 ⸻
 



  





 What You Bring
 



 • Strong fundamentals in Data Structures, Algorithms, and backend architecture.
 



 • Basic experience with Golang or willingness to learn quickly.
 



 • Working knowledge of SQL and relational databases (PostgreSQL preferred).
 



 • Understanding of REST APIs, microservices, and server\\-side development.
 



 • Familiarity with Git and version control workflows.
 



 • Problem\\-solving mindset and ability to work in a startup environment.
 



  





 ⸻
 



  





 Why Join
 



 • Work directly with the founding tech team on a live logistics platform.
 



 • Gain practical experience building scalable backend systems.
 



 • See your code deployed and used by real users in the logistics ecosystem.
 



 • Internship certificate \\+ letter of recommendation.
 



 • Opportunity for performance\\-based continuation.**
